creator: yuminghou@263.net
text:
An well known Internat game ,Counter Strike, perform smoothly on Linux 7
while often terminated by System of Free BSD4.3
"Ping pacage time limit out"
I am not sure whether or not my system configuration has some errors.
I like FreeBSD. I have to switch that Game server to Linux 7. But I hope one day I will make it return to yoour Linux System.
I suspect your linux compat has some flaws.

Fix: 

I donot know
How-To-Repeat: Download Counter Strike and install on a FreeBSD server.
About at most 3 days that problem will occur.
